  Manages a WellPlayed tournament, including its registration window and full configuration (team sizing, registration conditions, and custom fields). Backed by the createTournament, updateTournament, and deleteTournament mutations.

# wellplayed_tournament (Resource)

Manages a WellPlayed tournament, including its registration window and full configuration (team sizing, registration conditions, and custom fields). Backed by the `createTournament`, `updateTournament`, and `deleteTournament` mutations.

Timestamps are RFC 3339 and compared by instant, so `2026-06-01T00:00:00Z` and `2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z` are treated as equal.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.

# A minimal tournament: only a title and description are required.
resource "wellplayed_tournament" "minimal" {
  title       = "Spring Open"
  description = "Our first open bracket of the season."
}

# A fully configured tournament with a registration window, team sizing,
# registration conditions, and custom registration fields.
resource "wellplayed_tournament" "championship" {
  title       = "Summer Championship"
  description = "Invitational 5v5 championship."

  start_at               = "2026-07-01T18:00:00Z"
  end_at                 = "2026-07-03T22:00:00Z"
  start_registrations_at = "2026-06-01T00:00:00Z"
  end_registrations_at   = "2026-06-25T23:59:59Z"

  configuration = {
    team_min_size = 2
    team_max_size = 5
    teams_count   = 16

    team_status_after_registration = "AWAITING_FOR_PRESENCE_CONFIRMATION"

    registration_conditions = {
      team_conditions = [
        {
          property           = "region"
          property_condition = "EXISTS"
          error_message      = "Teams must declare a region."

          string_condition = {
            condition_type = "EQ"
            value          = "EU"
          }
        }
      ]

      member_conditions = [
        {
          property_source  = "PLAYER"
          error_message    = "Players must be 18 or older."
          rule_description = "Minimum age 18"

          condition = {
            property           = "age"
            property_condition = "EXISTS"

            numeric_condition = {
              condition_type = "BTE" # greater-than-or-equal
              value          = 18
            }
          }
        }
      ]
    }

    custom_fields = [
      {
        property = "jersey_name"
        name     = "Jersey Name"
        type     = "STRING"
        required = true
        order    = 1
        unique   = false
      },

      {
        property   = "contact_email"
        name       = "Contact Email"
        type       = "EMAIL"
        required   = true
        order      = 2
        unique     = true
        visibility = "OWNER_OR_PERMISSION"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Description of the tournament.
- `title` (String) Display title of the tournament.

### Optional

- `configuration` (Attributes) Tournament configuration: team sizing, registration conditions, and custom fields. The API always provisions a default configuration server-side, so this block is managed write-only from configuration: it is sent on create/update but not refreshed during Read, and out-of-band changes are not detected as drift. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration))
- `end_at` (String) When the tournament ends (RFC 3339).
- `end_registrations_at` (String) When registrations close (RFC 3339).
- `start_at` (String) When the tournament starts (RFC 3339).
- `start_registrations_at` (String) When registrations open (RFC 3339).
- `visible_at` (String) When the tournament becomes visible (RFC 3339). Computed by the API when not set.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the tournament was created (RFC 3339).
- `created_by_id` (String) Account ID of the tournament creator.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the tournament.
- `organization_id` (String) ID of the organization that owns the tournament.
- `tournament_series_id` (String) ID of the tournament series this tournament belongs to, if any.
- `updated_at` (String) When the tournament was last updated (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration`

Optional:

- `custom_fields` (Attributes List) Custom field definitions collected during registration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--custom_fields))
- `registration_conditions` (Attributes) Conditions teams and players must meet to register. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions))
- `team_max_size` (Number) Maximum number of members per team.
- `team_min_size` (Number) Minimum number of members per team.
- `team_status_after_registration` (String) Team status applied after registration. One of `REGISTERED`, `AWAITING_FOR_PRESENCE_CONFIRMATION`, `AWAITING_FOR_PAYMENT`.
- `teams_count` (Number) Maximum number of teams.
- `type` (String) Configuration type. One of `TOURNAMENT`, `STEP`. Defaults to `TOURNAMENT`.

<a id="nestedatt--configuration--custom_fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.custom_fields`

Required:

- `name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `order` (Number) Display order position.
- `property` (String) Unique key identifier for this property.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether this property must be filled in.
- `type` (String) Data type. One of `DATE`, `COUNTRY`, `STRING`, `BOOLEAN`, `PHONE`, `EMAIL`, `URL`, `NUMBER`.
- `unique` (Boolean) Whether the value must be unique across all entities.

Optional:

- `editability` (String) Editability rule. One of `ALWAYS`, `ONE_TIME`, `WITH_PERMISSION`.
- `visibility` (String) Visibility level. One of `PUBLIC`, `OWNER`, `OWNER_OR_PERMISSION`, `WITH_PERMISSION`.


<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions`

Optional:

- `member_conditions` (Attributes List) Conditions applied to each team member during registration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions))
- `team_conditions` (Attributes List) Conditions applied at the team level during registration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions))

<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.member_conditions`

Required:

- `condition` (Attributes) The condition rule evaluated against the player property. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition))
- `property_source` (String) Source of the player data. One of `PLAYER`, `IDENTITY_PROVIDER`.

Optional:

- `error_message` (String) Custom error message shown when the condition fails.
- `property_source_id` (String) Identifier of the data source (e.g. identity provider ID).
- `rule_description` (String) Human-readable description of the rule.

<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.member_conditions.condition`

Required:

- `property` (String) Name of the property to evaluate.
- `property_condition` (String) Whether the property must exist. One of `EXISTS`, `DONT_EXIST`.

Optional:

- `numeric_condition` (Attributes) Numeric comparison applied to the property. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition--numeric_condition))
- `string_condition` (Attributes) String comparison applied to the property. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition--string_condition))

<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition--numeric_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.member_conditions.condition.numeric_condition`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String) Comparison operator. One of `LT`, `BT`, `LTE`, `BTE`, `EQ`, `NEQ`.
- `value` (Number) Numeric value to compare against.


<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--member_conditions--condition--string_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.member_conditions.condition.string_condition`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String) Comparison operator. One of `EQ`, `NEQ`.
- `value` (String) String value to compare against.




<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.team_conditions`

Required:

- `property` (String) Name of the team property to evaluate.
- `property_condition` (String) Whether the property must exist. One of `EXISTS`, `DONT_EXIST`.

Optional:

- `error_message` (String) Custom error message shown when the condition fails.
- `numeric_condition` (Attributes) Numeric comparison with optional aggregation across team members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions--numeric_condition))
- `string_condition` (Attributes) String comparison applied to the property. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions--string_condition))

<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions--numeric_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.team_conditions.numeric_condition`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String) Comparison operator. One of `LT`, `BT`, `LTE`, `BTE`, `EQ`, `NEQ`.
- `value` (Number) Numeric value to compare against.

Optional:

- `aggregation_type` (String) Aggregation method across team members. One of `SUM`, `AVG`, `MIN`, `MAX`.
- `property_source` (String) Source of the property data. One of `PLAYER`, `IDENTITY_PROVIDER`.
- `property_source_id` (String) Identifier of the property data source.


<a id="nestedatt--configuration--registration_conditions--team_conditions--string_condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration.registration_conditions.team_conditions.string_condition`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String) Comparison operator. One of `EQ`, `NEQ`.
- `value` (String) String value to compare against.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.

# Tournaments are imported by their ID. Authored fields (title, description,
# dates, configuration) are refreshed from the API on the next plan.
terraform import wellplayed_tournament.championship trn_01h...
```
